title: mna #3414
definition:
1) in the OT, a weight of 300 shekels was one pound
 2) In the NT, a weight and sum of money equal to 100 drachmae,
    one talent was 100 pounds, a pound equalled 10 1/3 oz. (300 gm)
nasbUsage:
